mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feed_reply ( feed_id, username, reply_content, deleted, parents_reply_id ) VALUES( #{feedId}, #{username}, #{replyContent}, 0, #{parentsReplyId} )
mapper.update: update feed set reply_cnt = reply_cnt +1 where feed_id=#{feedId}
mapper.select: SELECT r.reply_id AS replyId, r.feed_id AS feedId, r.username AS username, m.nickname AS nickname, r.reply_content AS replyContent, r.parents_reply_id AS parentsReplyId, r.deleted AS deleted, parent_member.nickname AS parentNickname, mp.saved_name AS profileImage FROM feed_reply r JOIN member m ON r.username = m.username LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON r.username = mp.username LEFT JOIN feed_reply parent_reply ON r.parents_reply_id = parent_reply.reply_id LEFT JOIN member parent_member ON parent_reply.username = parent_member.username WHERE r.feed_id = #{feedId} ORDER BY r.reply_id ASC

SELECT r.reply_id AS replyId, r.feed_id AS feedId, r.username AS username, m.nickname AS nickname, r.reply_content AS replyContent, r.parents_reply_id AS parentsReplyId, r.deleted AS deleted, parent_member.nickname AS parentNickname, mp.saved_name AS profileImage FROM feed_reply r JOIN member m ON r.username = m.username LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON r.username = mp.username LEFT JOIN feed_reply parent_reply ON r.parents_reply_id = parent_reply.reply_id LEFT JOIN member parent_member ON parent_reply.username = parent_member.username WHERE r.feed_id = #{feedId} ORDER BY r.reply_id ASC
mapper.update: update feed_reply set reply_content=#{replyContent} where reply_id=#{replyId}
update feed_reply fr join feed f on fr.feed_id=f.feed_id set fr.deleted=1,f.reply_cnt = f.reply_cnt -1 where reply_id=#{replyId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM feed_reply WHERE parents_reply_id = (SELECT parents_reply_id FROM feed_reply where reply_id=#{replyId})
